title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — node-role.kubernetes.io/*
text:
Type: Label
Example:
node-role.kubernetes.io/gpu: gpu
Used on: Node
This optional label is applied to a node when you want to mark a node role.
The node role (text following
/
in the label key) can be set, as long as the overall key follows the
syntax
rules for
object labels.
Kubernetes defines one specific node role,
control-plane
. A label you can use to mark that node
role is
node-role.kubernetes.io/control-plane
.
